block_00: What to do when the asset prices fall?
block_01: Many traders know how to trade in a bullish market and going “long” feels natural as rising assets are associated with good performance. However, when markets are unstable and fluctuate, it creates many possibilities for short selling.
block_02: Short selling may be an appealing strategy for those who want to take advantage of a bearish trend. Be it a short-term decline or a full-on recession, there is always an opportunity for trading.
block_03: Read the full article to learn how to short sell assets on IQ Option.
